message:
feat(plan): Add cancellation/obligation safety side conditions (bd-3a1g)

Add three new side-condition methods to SideConditionChecker in analysis.rs:
- rewrite_preserves_loser_drain: rejects rewrites that degrade cancel-safety
  or grow the leak-on-cancel obligation set
- rewrite_preserves_finalize_order: ensures obligation-bearing children
  maintain relative order in Join nodes across rewrites
- rewrite_no_new_obligation_leaks: catches safety degradation,
  all_paths_resolve loss, leak set growth, and must_resolve demotions

Integrate into check_side_conditions in rewrite.rs with rule-specific
enforcement: obligation leaks checked for all rules, loser-drain for
race rules, finalize-order for join rules.

Includes 8 unit tests covering preservation, rejection, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
